title: Lendingkart Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Lendingkart Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Lendingkart Capital India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lendingkart Capital India:
Lendingkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart Capital India!
